basicInfo.name: Nightmare Destruction Bai Jiao
basicInfo.flavor: Eventually, Bai Jiao became the emperor's right-hand man and was known as the \"Eminent Official.\" There are many rumors circulating among the people that he bewitched the emperor with his sorcery.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Poison. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Centipede Poison
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 70% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - Each attack has a 100% chance to inflict Poison. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Fiendish Decree
Skill 2.desc:
Single Enemy
 - 100% chance to inflict Poison. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Dark Incantations
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with 100% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 25 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Grants All Damage Immunity when HP falls to 50% or lower. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
Bai Jiao is an official from Aisha.
A man of exceptional intellect and bold action, he quickly passed the civil service exam and became an official.
But while investigating the nature of humanity, he concluded it was necessary to obtain a special power to transcend humanity's limits and become a greater being.
Following this realization, he became obsessed with the Power of Destruction.
After all, the Power of Destruction had always been behind the greatest turning points of history.
However, as his research continued, his hopes increasingly turned to despair.
He realized that only a select few who were chosen by that power could wield it at all.
Moreover, he was not one of those chosen few.
The intensity of his devotion to the Power of Destruction only further stoked the flames of his anger.
He began to study demonic power due to its similarity to the Power of Destruction.
As Bai Jiao delved deeper into his nefarious studies in lieu of ordinary academic pursuits, he was shunned by those around him — save for Emperor Pascal of Aisha.
The emperor kept him close, and together they studied both demonic power and the Power of Destruction. Armed with his vast knowledge and wisdom, Bai Jiao ascended into power.
It wasn't long before he eventually became the emperor's right-hand man.
And rumors soon spread through the imperial palace that Bai Jiao had bewitched the emperor with his sorcery.
